title: Literature-anchored modules
text: Fixed gene sets spanning epithelial/plasticity, antigen-presentation, myeloid, proliferation, and cytolytic programs

title: Fixed scoring
text: Gene-level z-scores and module means; antigen-presentation/CXCL9/HLA-II composite fixed after framework refinement

title: Evidence across contexts
text: I-SPY2 internal association; GSE25066_RMA chemotherapy-context assessment; additional NAC cohorts; METABRIC recurrence

title: Biological localization
text: GSE266919 single-cell data; Myeloid, dendritic-cell, macrophage, and B-cell localization of antigen-presentation programs

title: Interpretation boundary
text: State-decomposition analysis, not a general pCR prediction assay
